response: The new iPhone 15 Pro starts at $999 and features a 6.1-inch OLED display, the powerful A17 Pro chip, and a 48 MP main camera, all wrapped in a sleek 187 g frame. Backed by a 3,274 mAh battery and storage options of 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB, or 1 TB, it has won an impressive 4.6/5 rating from reviewers.
